name: Google Chat API

rate_limits.space_creation_limit: 35 spaces per minute and 800 spaces per hour for GROUP_CHAT or SPACE types

auth_notes: The Google Chat API supports two primary authentication methods: OAuth 2.0 for user-level authentication (acting on behalf of a user) and Service Accounts for app-level authentication (acting as the Chat app itself). Domain-wide delegation can be used with service accounts to impersonate users, which requires Google Workspace administrator approval. Key authorization scopes include 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/chat.messages', 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/chat.spaces', and 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/chat.bot' for app-only interactions.
